headline: Johor Flood Wall Protects Only 12km of 85km Riverbank
context: The RM2.4 billion Johor flood wall completed protection for only 12km of 85km Sungai Johor riverbank identified as high-risk.

cards.big: Johor flood wall covers only 12km of 85km high-risk riverbank after 4 years
cards.sub: Remaining 73km leaves 180,000 residents vulnerable to annual monsoon flooding

cards.big: 2025 monsoon damaged 12,000 properties along unprotected sections
cards.sub: Repair costs exceeded RM580 million greater than annual wall construction budget

cards.big: Contractor disputes delayed 3 of 8 packages by 18 months each
cards.sub: RM480 million in approved payments withheld pending dispute resolution

cards.big: DID revised completion from 2027 to 2032 at current pace
cards.sub: Climate projections indicate flood frequency will double before protection complete

cards.big: Flood wall progress tests whether protection infrastructure can outpace climate change
12km of 85km riverbank protected. Johor's flood wall covers the visible stretch, not the vulnerable one.
